blocks.text: Allah has established five daily prayers, each with its own specific time window.

1. Fajr: From dawn until sunrise.
2. Dhuhr: From the sun's meridian until the beginning of Asr.
3. Asr: From mid-afternoon until sunset.
4. Maghrib: From sunset until the end of twilight.
5. Isha: From nightfall until dawn.
Performing prayers at their earliest times is highly recommended and beloved to Allah.
